steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content: At the $y$-intercept, the graph crosses the $y$-axis. The $x$-coordinate is $0$, so substitute $x=0$ into $y=9x^2+64$.

steps.title: Evaluate the output
steps.content:
The squared term becomes $0$, leaving the constant term as the $y$-value.
$y=9(0)^2+64$
$y=64$
The answer is 64.
